Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

243 
VAL_CD_Q1_PYMT_RDCTN_AMT 
LABEL: 
Value Code Q1 Payment Reduction Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This field is derived by accumulating the amount field (CLM VAL AMT) found in the value code trailer for 
value code (CLM VAL CD) equal to 'Q1' for any claim records included in the stay. 
SHORT NAME: VAL_CD_Q1_PYMT_RDCTN_AMT 
LONG NAME: VAL_CD_Q1_PYMT_RDCTN_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR
